docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2008 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PITTMAN, CHARIE AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, STACY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED JAN-31-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, STACY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PITTMAN, CHARIE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PITTMAN, CHARIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORGAN, STACY $6,600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,600.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY OF $2,200.00 GENERAL DAMAGES, AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $4,400.00. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
